mapper.insert:
insert into gz_order_entry_code_ref ( id, tenant_id, src_acceptance_id, src_acceptance_no, src_order_entry_id, src_barcode_line_id, src_in_hospital_code, tgt_bill_kind, tgt_main_id, tgt_bill_no, tgt_entry_id, ref_purpose, material_id, material_name, warehouse_id, create_by, create_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.srcAcceptanceId}, #{item.srcAcceptanceNo}, #{item.srcOrderEntryId}, #{item.srcBarcodeLineId}, #{item.srcInHospitalCode}, #{item.tgtBillKind}, #{item.tgtMainId}, #{item.tgtBillNo}, #{item.tgtEntryId}, #{item.refPurpose}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime} )
mapper.delete: delete from gz_order_entry_code_ref where tgt_main_id = #{tgtMainId} and tgt_bill_kind = #{tgtBillKind}
